channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Barriers around damaged roundabout at junction of Bath Road, Shurdington Road and Leckhampton Road,, 12th June
item.description:
I think work is yet to be done to restore the roundabout (I have emailed previously about this) but am wondering about timescales for the repairs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A46, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Dog poo bin at crickley hill needs emptying, 12th June
item.description:
Dog poo bin at crickley hill needs emptying. Full to overflowing with waste on the ground around.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 12th June
item.description:
Please jet the gullies as per the plan. This may require the small jetter
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 12th June
item.description:
Customer reporting driving through this junction and no illumination could be seen. Looking in her mirror it appeared all the units were "off".
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th June
item.description:
15DB 28day with road closure CW pothole 350x350x40mm plus x1 NSD perm repair STATS (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th June
item.description:

item.title: Broken tree overhanging riad, 12th June
item.description:
Tree has been hit, a branch is hanging over the road approx 8ft above the tarmac, vans are hitting it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pot hole with sharp edge, 12th June
item.description:
///spun.riders.assets It's just where your wheel goes over because of park cars so getting worse and worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Westdown Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping near wardens wood, 12th June
item.description:
Lots of fly tipped rubbish here at wardens wood car park on Cleeve hill. Likes like a broken up wardrobe, children’s toys, a mattress, old furniture etc.. has been here for approx 1 month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Lane, Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 12th June
item.description:
Cw pothole 400x300x43mm Rd closure (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 12th June
item.description:

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 12th June
item.description:
Diversion is directing drivers from the A436 down tthis narrow line
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Vegetation spilling onto roadway on both sides, long overdue a cutback, 12th June
item.description:
The vegetation overgrowth stretches along the entirety of this section of Larkhay Road (about 75-100m), starting at the left fork of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 12th June
item.description:
Changing several post and some sign faces
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 12th June
item.description:
Remove fallen Willow tree off the residents house and shed and re-pollard the willow. Will need MEWP and Stop n go. (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 12th June
item.description:
